name: Empanadillas Filled with Rabbit and Olives
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the rabbit filling by sautéing olive oil in a pan.
2. Add sliced fennel and cook until tender.
3. Stir in chopped garlic and sweet onions, cooking until softened.
4. Incorporate white wine, chicken stock, and diced tomatoes into the mixture.
5. Mix in the pitted green olives and parsley, adjusting seasoning as needed.
6. Stuff rabbit pieces with the prepared filling.
7. Shape into empanadas and seal well.
8. Bake or fry according to preference until fully cooked through.
